pages.text: Teapots are used to brew Tea from Tea Leaves, and, optionally, different fruits to flavor it. Teapots must have some form of heat source, such as a campfire or a lit furnace under them to be able to brew tea.
pages.title: Teapot

pages.text: Tea Leaves, harvested from the Tea Plant, are brewed with water to make tea.
pages.title: Tea Leaves
